fn_def_list.fn_code:
static int
aarch64_stap_is_single_operand (struct gdbarch *gdbarch, const char *s)
{
  return (*s == '#' || isdigit (*s) /* Literal number.  */
	  || *s == '[' /* Register indirection.  */
	  || isalpha (*s)); /* Register value.  */
}
